imaging_protocol: description='Two-color 488/561 acquisition using continuous focus lock.' acquisition=ImagingAcquisitionConfig(channels=['Fluorescence 488 nm Ex', 'Fluorescence 561 nm Ex'], z_stack=ZStackConfig(planes=3, step_um=0.5, direction='from_center'), acquisition_order='channel_first', save_format=None, skip_saving=True) focus_gate=FocusGateConfig(mode=<AutofocusMode.FOCUS_LOCK: 'focus_lock'>, channel=None, interval_fovs=1, focus_lock=FocusLockConfig(buffer_length=5, recovery_attempts=3, min_spot_snr=10.0, acquire_threshold_um=0.25, maintain_threshold_um=0.5, auto_search_enabled=False, lock_timeout_s=5.0), require_in_focus=True, max_focus_error_um=None, max_focus_attempts=2, on_focus_gate_fail='skip_fov') capture_policy=CapturePolicyConfig(max_capture_attempts=2, retry_delay_s=0.1, on_capture_fail='fail_step')
